memory.title: Perfect Memory
memory.tagline: That thing you mentioned six months ago? We remember.
memory.description: Your best mate forgets. Your therapist has other patients. We remember everything—every conversation, every goal, every detail that matters to you.

presence.title: Constant Presence
presence.description: Shows up at 2am with the same warmth as noon. No bad days. No distraction. Fully here, whenever you need.

team.title: Six Perspectives
team.tagline: Six perspectives, one conversation, no referrals.
team.description: Life coach, researcher, communicator, habit expert, planner, and sage—all working together, all aware of your story.

understanding.title: True Understanding
understanding.tagline: We hear what you're not saying.
understanding.description: We notice the pause. The deflection. The pattern you can't see. Understanding isn't just listening—it's truly getting it.

team.sectionSubtitle: Six brilliant minds working together for you

ferni.bio: Your main point of contact. Asks the questions that unlock insight, celebrates every win, and connects you to the right specialist when you need them.
ferni.sampleQuote: I noticed you said 'fine' three times this week. What's actually going on?

nayan.bio: Your lifetime mentor. Combines patience, simplicity, and wit to help you see that small, consistent actions over decades create extraordinary results.
nayan.sampleQuote: What would 80-year-old you think about this decision?

peter.bio: Spots patterns nobody else sees across your spending, habits, and calendar. Turns data into insights that actually change behaviour.
peter.sampleQuote: You spend 23 hours a month on things you said don't matter to you. Want to see?

alex.bio: Your Chief of Staff and communication coach. Helps you navigate difficult conversations with confidence.
alex.sampleQuote: Let's practise that conversation. I'll play your boss. Ready?

maya.bio: Start embarrassingly small. Maya helps you build habits that stick through systems, not willpower.
maya.sampleQuote: What if we started with just putting your shoes on? That's it. Just the shoes.

jordan.bio: Turns vague dreams into lived experiences. From holidays to life transitions, Jordan helps you design every chapter.
jordan.sampleQuote: You mentioned wanting to visit Japan 'someday.' Let's make it a real day.

pricing.headline: Start free.
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No contracts. Cancel anytime.

trust.title: Built on trust.
trust.description: Your conversations are yours. Always. We use enterprise-grade encryption and never sell your data.

footer.madeBy: Made with ♥ by AI, for humans.

errorPage.title: Lost in thought?
errorPage.subtitle: Let's get you back on track.
